exit_criteria: BulletS2CPacket batch sync implemented (per-tick, render-distance culled, short-life forced sync)
GunSyncS2CPacket gun data sync implemented (plugins + modifierVersion + state, 4 trigger scenarios)
Data packet registration via RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent + PayloadRegistrar + CustomPacketPayload implemented
Client BulletRenderManager + BulletRenderObject implemented (non-Entity render objects)
Short-life bullet forced full sync at creation tick end implemented
Bullet visual style priority (gun -> plugin -> onVisualTick) implemented
onVisualTick trait hook (ON_VISUAL_TICK, client-only, per-frame) implemented
Shoot texture switching (per_shot + while_firing modes) implemented
isFiring flag maintenance (local player client-side + other players server sync) implemented
shootAnimTimer animation timer (local zero-delay + server sync + tick decay) implemented
Plugin texture overlay compositing (layer sorting + 2D compositing) implemented
Third-person shoot animation Mixin (HumanoidModel injection + crossbow pose) implemented
Client shoot request sending (ShootC2SPacket every tick on left-click) implemented
modifierVersion anti-cheat (inconsistency counter, 3-strike rule, WARN log) implemented
Project compiles successfully (gradle build / compileJava no errors)
Verification: bullets visible after shooting; hit effects play; third-person shoot animation visible; while_firing mode no flicker at low fire rate; anti-cheat triggers WARN log
